Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Well done on conducting fleet operations within your formation! You have now mastered management of your ships within a formation. This is a critical skill for Sea Power and will come in handy in the following tutorials.

Feel free to take this time to practice formation management. You can try placing your three ships back in a formation that allows the best protection for the tanker assuming an enemy threat approaching from the northwest, or maybe try stationing Narvik as a radar picket 50 nautical miles to the east.
This completes the second Officer Training session. Good work, Commander!
